title: kyllinga aphylla
intro: Kyllinga aphylla, also known as the flat cumbungi or jointed glasswort, is a species of aquatic plant native to Australia and South East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Kyllinga aphylla can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
